title: Procter's Earnings Start To Show Weakness In Q4
text: Procter and Gamble's earnings report: Inflation and global slowdown has started to affect durables, but overall the company continues to perform well.

title: PG&E Corporation (PCG) CEO Patti Poppe on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Matt Fallon - Senior Director, Investor Relations Patti Poppe - Chief Executive Officer Chris Foster - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Jonathan Arnold - Vertical Research Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Richard Sunderland - JPMorgan Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Nick Campanella - Credit Suisse Gregg Orrill - UBS David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Ryan Levine - Citi Operator Hello and thank you for standing by. My name is Regina and I will be your conference operator today.

title: PG&E Corp. (PCG) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: PG&E Corp.'s (PCG) total revenues of $5,118 million decline 1.9% from the year-ago quarter. Revenues also miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 10.9%.

title: PG&E (PCG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: PG&E (PCG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -16.67% and 9.37%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: PG&E Corporation Reports Second-Quarter 2022 Financial Results, on Track for Adjusted GAAP Earnings Guidance of $0.74 to $1.02 per Diluted Share and Reaffirmed Non-GAAP Core Earnings Guidance of $1.07 to $1.13 per Diluted Share
text: OAKLAND, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) recorded second-quarter 2022 income available for common shareholders of $356 million, or $0.17 per diluted share, as reported in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP). This compares with income available for common shareholders of $397 million, or $0.18 per diluted share, for the second quarter of 2021. title: 7 Bear Market Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: While there are many popular equities that are on discount, these bear market stocks to buy on the dip can weather the storm. The post 7 Bear Market Stocks to Buy on the Dip appeared first on InvestorPlace.
